title: The Inter-State River Water Disputes Act, 1956
full_text: The Inter-State River Water Disputes Act, 1956 अन्तर्राज्यिक जल विवाद अधिनियम, 1956 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 195633 Act Number: 33 Enactment Date: 1956-08-28 Act Year: 1956 Short Title: The Inter-State River Water Disputes Act, 1956 Hindi Title: अन्तर्राज्यिक जल विवाद अधिनियम, 1956 Long Title: An Act to provide for the adjudication of disputes relating to waters of inter-State rivers and river valleys. Ministry: Ministry of Jal Shaktri Department: Department of Water Resources, River Development and Ganga Rejuvenation Enforcement Date: 28-08-1956 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Inter-State River Water Disputes Act, 1956 Show all section Section 1. Short title and extent. Show Related Subordinates Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Complaints by State Governments as to water disputes. Section 4. Constitution of Tribunal. Show Related Subordinates Section 5. Adjudication of water disputes. Show Related Subordinates Section 5A. Filling of vacancies. Show Related Subordinates Section 6. Publication of decision of Tribunal. Show Related Subordinates Section 6A. Power to make schemes to implement decision of Tribunal. Show Related Subordinates Section 7. Prohibition of levy of seigniorage, etc. Section 8. Bar of reference of certain disputes to Tribunal. Section 9. Powers of Tribunal. Section 9A. maintenance of date bank and information. Show Related Subordinates Section 10. Allowances or fees for presiding officer of Tribunal and assessors. Section 11. Bar of jurisdiction of Supreme Court and other courts. Section 12. Dissolution of Tribunal. Show Related Subordinates Section 13. Power to make rules. Show Related Subordinates Section 14. Constitution of Ravi and Beas Waters Tribunal.
